homepage.snapshots.console.description.message: This screenshot introduces zero-trust networking, remote access, security features, and primary scenarios in one view.

homepage.snapshots.pricing.description.message: The current public pricing section helps explain rollout choices alongside deployment guidance.

homepage.snapshots.heading.message: Bring official product screens directly into the help center

homepage.snapshots.subheading.message: The docs site now includes real homepage captures and can grow with deeper control-plane, device, and audit screenshots later.

homepage.hero.title.message: Operate a safer remote network and govern every device from one console

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Larktun combines zero-trust networking, reliable remote access, and centralized operations so distributed teams can move quickly without compromising security.

homepage.panel.title.message: Networking, remote control, and compliance audit converge in one control plane

homepage.panel.item.docs.message: A zero-trust mesh built on Headscale and WireGuard supports stable connectivity across regions and platforms

homepage.panel.item.blog.message: Low-latency access for RDP, SSH, and VNC comes with session analytics and path-quality visibility

homepage.panel.item.showcase.message: Temporary approval flows, MFA, enterprise SSO, and audit logs help satisfy security and compliance requirements

homepage.panel.item.i18n.message: Shared relay, dedicated relay, and private or hybrid rollout paths support teams from pilot to enterprise scale

homepage.meta.description.message: Larktun documentation for zero-trust networking, remote access, deployment guidance, troubleshooting, blog content, and scenarios.

showcase.principles.value.description.message: Organize content around distributed engineering, IT operations and MSPs, and enterprise remote work to map directly to real delivery scenarios.

showcase.principles.path.description.message: Include relay mode, identity policy, approvals, and audit behavior so readers can understand how the solution lands in practice.

showcase.principles.reuse.description.message: Every scenario should connect back to quick start, deployment modes, or troubleshooting so presales and delivery teams do not repeat the same explanations.

showcase.cases.preview.title.message: Give remote engineering teams secure access to repositories, build nodes, and debug environments

showcase.cases.preview.problem.message: Distributed engineering teams need access to build nodes, staging systems, and internal resources, but legacy VPNs are expensive, slow, and hard to scope precisely.

showcase.cases.preview.solution.message: Use zero-trust networking, shared or dedicated relay, policy templates, and session analytics so engineers can reach the right targets on demand while preserving a full audit trail.

showcase.cases.preview.outcome.message: A good fit for cross-region development, branch debugging, on-call coverage, and remote desktop support where path stability matters.

showcase.cases.intranet.title.message: Manage customer servers, desktop assets, and device health from one place

showcase.cases.intranet.problem.message: Operations teams and MSPs need to manage multiple fleets while balancing response speed, permission boundaries, and customer isolation.

showcase.cases.intranet.solution.message: Workspace separation, device lifecycle management, dedicated relay, and a centralized security event view bring multi-tenant device governance into one control plane.

showcase.cases.intranet.outcome.message: A strong fit for asset inspection, desktop operations, incident response, long-term managed service delivery, and multi-team collaboration.

showcase.cases.support.title.message: Provide secure entry to internal systems with temporary approvals and full behavior audit

showcase.cases.support.problem.message: Internal systems must stay reachable for remote work without letting permissions sprawl, audit trails disappear, or cross-team access linger indefinitely.

showcase.cases.support.solution.message: Combine approvals, temporary authorization, MFA, enterprise SSO, and security logs to offer one governed access path for remote work without sacrificing speed.

showcase.cases.support.outcome.message: Useful for headquarters and branch collaboration, time-boxed partner access, compliance review, and remote entry into internal systems.

showcase.meta.description.message: Larktun scenarios and showcase page for presenting customer stories, solution patterns, and business value.

showcase.hero.title.message: Support hybrid work and secure remote access for teams of different sizes

showcase.hero.description.message: The official site currently centers on distributed engineering teams, IT operations and MSPs, and enterprise remote work. This page turns those tracks into a showcase structure you can keep expanding.

showcase.summary.item.problem.message: Define the team and resource boundary first, then explain whether the rollout uses shared relay, dedicated relay, or private deployment

showcase.summary.item.architecture.message: Keep Headscale, access policy, approvals, and audit in the same end-to-end access path

showcase.summary.item.outcome.message: Present scenario value in terms of stability, response efficiency, and compliance gains

showcase.principles.heading.message: The showcase page already has an expandable structure

showcase.cases.heading.message: These example cards can be replaced directly with real customer scenarios

homepage.features.mesh.description.message: Build stable cross-region connectivity on top of WireGuard and Headscale, with every device enrolled under least-privilege access by default.

homepage.features.control.description.message: Optimize access paths for RDP, SSH, and VNC with temporary approval, automatic recovery, and better cross-region operator experience.

homepage.features.security.title.message: Secure by default, traceable end to end

homepage.features.security.description.message: Use MFA, enterprise SSO, policy templates, audit logs, and anomaly signals to bring security governance into day-to-day access flows.

homepage.entries.docs.description.message: Product overview, deployment modes, onboarding flows, and troubleshooting.

homepage.entries.blog.description.message: Release notes, best practices, and content updates live here.

homepage.entries.showcase.description.message: Entry points for distributed engineering, IT operations, and enterprise remote work.

homepage.features.heading.message: Structure content around real product capabilities

homepage.features.subheading.message: The help center is now ready to carry formal content for zero-trust networking, remote access, security controls, deployment models, and scenario guidance.

architectureDemo.card.description.message: Run login, direct path, and DERP relay flows directly inside the docs page, or open the full demo in a separate tab.
